description: Universal bridge between VS Code and external formatting/linting engines.
command.title: Correr diagnostico del archivo actual
config.title: Frakto Code Engine Configuration
config.execPath.description:
Absolute path to the directory containing the external script for formatting and diagnostics.

Can be set globally or overridden per language.
config.enableFormat.description:
Controls whether **Frakto Code Engine** should format the current file.

Can be set globally or overridden per language.
config.enableDiagnostics.description:
Controls whether **Frakto Code Engine** should analyze the current file and display diagnostics.

Can be set globally or overridden per language.
config.linterStandard.description:
Specifies the linter standard to use.

Can be set globally or overridden per language.

Examples: `eslint`, `phpcs`, `pylint`, etc.
config.maxExecTime.description:
Maximum time in milliseconds allowed for **Frakto Code Engine** to complete (formatting and/or diagnostics in a single run).

If the process takes longer, it will be terminated. Increase this value if your linter/formatter needs more time.
config.debounceTime.description:
Delay time in milliseconds before executing the external script after a document change.

Prevents excessive executions while typing. Increase this value on slower systems or with large files to reduce CPU usage.
message.invalidJson:
Invalid JSON received from external script.
{0}
